ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fan_works" (
  "fan_work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan work */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the fan work */,
  "word_index" INTEGER /* Word index of the fan work */,
  "word" TEXT /* Word in the fan work */,
  "orth_id" INTEGER /* Orthographic ID of the fan work */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fan work was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fan work was last updated */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the fan work was published */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Total word count of the fan work */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the fan work */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the fan work */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fan work (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "original_scripts" (
  "script_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each original script */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the original script */,
  "word_index" INTEGER /* Word index of the original script */,
  "word" TEXT /* Word in the original script */,
  "orth_id" INTEGER /* Orthographic ID of the original script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the original script was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the original script was last updated */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the original script was published */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Total word count of the original script */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the original script */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the original script */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the original script (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "fan_work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan work being compared */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original script being compared */,
  "best_match_distance" REAL /* Best match distance between the fan work and original script */,
  "levenshtein_distance" INTEGER /* Levenshtein distance between the fan work and original script */,
  "combined_distance" REAL /* Combined distance between the fan work and original script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comparison was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comparison was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comparison (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the comparison */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES original_scripts ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_fan_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_work_id") REFERENCES fan_works ("fan_work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the comparison */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_work_word_indices" (
  "word_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word index */,
  "fan_work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan work */,
  "word_index" INTEGER /* Word index of the fan work */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the word index was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the word index was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_work_word_indices_fan_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_work_id") REFERENCES fan_works ("fan_work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "original_script_word_indices" (
  "word_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word index */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original script */,
  "word_index" INTEGER /* Word index of the original script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the word index was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the word index was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_original_script_word_indices_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES original_scripts ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "fan_work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan work */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original script */,
  "characteristic" TEXT /* Characteristic of the fan work or original script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the characteristic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the characteristic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characteristics_fan_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_work_id") REFERENCES fan_works ("fan_work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characteristics_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES original_scripts ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "fan_work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan work */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original script */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the fan work or original script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES original_scripts ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_fan_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_work_id") REFERENCES fan_works ("fan_work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "fan_work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan work */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original script */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the fan work or original script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was last updated */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_fan_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_work_id") REFERENCES fan_works ("fan_work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES original_scripts ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenes" (
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene */,
  "fan_work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan work */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original script */,
  "scene" TEXT /* Scene of the fan work or original script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scene was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scene was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenes_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES original_scripts ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenes_fan_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_work_id") REFERENCES fan_works ("fan_work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "fan_work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan work */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original script */,
  "character" TEXT /* Character of the fan work or original script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES original_scripts ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_fan_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_work_id") REFERENCES fan_works ("fan_work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "fan_work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan work */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original script */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the fan work or original script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_fan_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_work_id") REFERENCES fan_works ("fan_work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES original_scripts ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata */,
  "fan_work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan work */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original script */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata of the fan work or original script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_fan_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_work_id") REFERENCES fan_works ("fan_work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES original_scripts ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "fan_work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan work */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original script */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between the fan work and original script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_fan_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_work_id") REFERENCES fan_works ("fan_work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES original_scripts ("script_id")
)
